subtitle.en: Turn risky assumptions into measurable learning experiments
subtitle.zh: 把高风险假设转化为可衡量的学习实验

headline.en: Turn risky assumptions into measurable tests
headline.zh: 把高风险假设转成可衡量实验

whyOpen.en: Use this when the team needs evidence before building, funding, or scaling a business-model choice.
whyOpen.zh: 当团队在开发、投入或规模化前需要证据时使用。

audience.en: Teams running discovery, validation, smoke tests, prototypes, pilots, or pre-sales.
audience.zh: 适合做探索、验证、烟雾测试、原型、试点或预售的团队。

firstSteps.en: Pick one assumption that could change the decision.
firstSteps.zh: 选择一条足以改变决策的假设。

firstSteps.en: Define the metric and threshold before running the experiment.
firstSteps.zh: 实验开始前先定义指标和门槛。

outcomes.en: A test plan with method, metric, threshold, result, and next decision.
outcomes.zh: 一份包含方法、指标、门槛、结果和下一步决策的测试计划。

practicePrompts.en: What result would make the team stop or pivot?
practicePrompts.zh: 什么结果会让团队停止或转向？

design-criteria-canvas.en: If the experiment passes, lock the result into a Must-have on the Design Criteria Canvas.
design-criteria-canvas.zh: 实验通过的话,把结论锁进 Design Criteria Canvas 的 Must-have。

value-proposition-canvas.en: Most riskiest assumptions live in VPC — Pains being acute enough, Gain Creators actually creating gains.
value-proposition-canvas.zh: 致命假设大多藏在 VPC 里 —— 痛点是否真的够痛、收益创造能否真的产生收益。

business-model-canvas.en: When the riskiest assumption is structural (channel, revenue stream), feed results back into the BMC block.
business-model-canvas.zh: 致命假设是结构性的(渠道、收入来源等)时,把结果反馈进 BMC 对应那一块。
